ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Spatial identifier for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval */,
  "temporal_id" INTEGER /* Temporal identifier for the interval */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the interval */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the interval */,
  "interval_description" TEXT /* Description of the time interval */,
  "interval_length" INTEGER /* Length of the time interval in minutes */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval falls on a weekend */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval falls on a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event occurred */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time interval during which the event occurred */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the event */,
  "target_normal" INTEGER /* Target value indicating normal event occurrence */,
  "occurrence_t_8" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 8 time intervals ago */,
  "occurrence_t_7" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 7 time intervals ago */,
  "occurrence_t_6" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 6 time intervals ago */,
  "occurrence_t_5" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 5 time intervals ago */,
  "occurrence_t_4" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 4 time intervals ago */,
  "occurrence_t_3" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 3 time intervals ago */,
  "occurrence_t_2" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 2 time intervals ago */,
  "occurrence_t_1" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event 1 time interval ago */,
  "occurrence_t" INTEGER /* Occurrence of the event in the current time interval */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event data */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the event prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the event details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES time_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the event type details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event occurrence */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "occurrence_time" TEXT /* Exact time of the event occurrence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event occurrence */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Entity or person who reported the event */,
  "reported_time" TEXT /* Time the event was reported */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time the event was responded to */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the event was resolved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_occurrences_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_occurrences_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, responder, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data used in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the model details were updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
